title: La fille du capitaine
summaries: "La fille du capitaine" by Aleksandr Sergeevich Pushkin is a historical novel first published in 1836. Set during Pugachev's Rebellion of 1773-1774, it follows young officer Pyotr Grinyov as he navigates love, loyalty, and survival. When the rebel leader Pugachev captures his fortress, Pyotr must balance his duty to the Russian Empire with an unexpected bond formed during a blizzard. As war unfolds, his romance with Captain Mironov's daughter Masha becomes entangled with accusations of treason that threaten everything. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
